subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Thou seest and knowest that I have desired naught save the creation of Thy servants and their attainment unto the pinnacle of Thy grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا الهی تری و تعلم انی مااردت الا ایجاد عبادک و بلوغهم الی ذروه فضلک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
